column8: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL) No recovery 2.93-4.00m.
Sub-rounded Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed coarse grained GRANITE with widely to closely spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow, rough, planar, slightly altered and chlorite and kaolin stained joints dipping 10, 20, 40, 50, 70, 80.
weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted, black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
